source: full local timed sweep 2026-07-17 (SHARD_TOTAL=1 over the whole coverage host set C, per-file `bun test --coverage`, PARALLEL=6 on a 32-core dev box). Covers every C member at generation time; new files weigh the median (scripts/shard-plan.ts). Regenerate by merging the timings-shard-N.json artifacts from a CI run, or rerunning the local sweep.
